sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-08-03 09:15
- Distance: 16.5 km
- Moving time: 1:34:45
- Elapsed time: 1:34:49
- Elevation gain: 114.6 m
- Average heart rate: 166.8 bpm
- Max heart rate: 177 bpm
- Average watts: 212.3 W
- Average speed: 10.5 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `7` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `166.1 bpm`, ranging from `151.3` to `170.4 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `164.3 bpm` and second-half average HR was `168.7 bpm` (+4.4 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `171.6 spm`, with a working range of `145.7` to `175.2 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `170.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `171.9 spm` (+1.3 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:44 /km` across `16.512 km` in `1:34:45` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:37 /km` and second-half pace was `5:52 /km` (+15 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `166.8 bpm` average and `177 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `163.2 bpm` in the first half and `170.2 bpm` in the second (+7.0 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `1:34:45` out of `1:34:49` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `156.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.0 m` and `69.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `92.8 m` in the first half and `64.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
